title: Adding multiple subitems in Kanban view
excerpt:
Hey Community, 
Happy new year!

posts.author: AaronR-Enable (Aaron Ripper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community,

Happy new year!

We have a client that uses subitems in Kanban view but at the moment it will only allow creation of one subitem unless you go back to main table view then add subitems.

Has anyone experienced this or found a workaround?

Thanks
Aaron

posts.author: jackw (Jack Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml:
No it’s so frustrating there is seemingly no work around and it makes you go back to the maintable to fix this issue.
There are multiple threads from years ago and it has never been resolved.

posts.author: Stela1 (Stela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all

We’re thrilled to announce the launch of our Kanbanify app in the monday.com marketplace!

Kanbanify streamlines your workflow by connecting multiple boards to one powerful Kanban view where you can add filters to prioritize your/your teams work and stay focused. You can also combine subitems as separate cards in one Kanban view.

There is also a free plan to get you started!

This is just the beginning! We’re constantly adding new features based on your feedback. Let us know what you think and suggest features you’d love to see!

Thank you,

Stela
Head of marketing

Appstorm
